title: Electron Microscopy Laboratory Session
body: Template to be completed before a session at the FIB-SEM or TEM microscope. The information required concerns the operator and the sample analysed
metadata: {"elabftw": {"extra_fields_groups": [{"id": 1, "name": "USER INFORMATIONS"}, {"id": 2, "name": "SAMPLE INFORMATIONS"}, {"id": 3, "name": "ELECTRON MICROSCOPE"}]}, "extra_fields": {"Method": {"type": "select", "value": "experiment", "options": ["experiment", "simulation"], "group_id": 2, "position": 1, "required": true, "description": "A qualifier whether the sample is a real one or a virtual one (in a computer simulation)"}, "Atom types": {"type": "text", "value": "*", "group_id": 2, "position": 2, "required": true, "description": "List of comma-separated elements from the periodic table that are contained in the sample."}, "Affiliation": {"type": "text", "value": "*", "group_id": 1, "position": 1, "required": true}, "Sample name": {"type": "text", "value": "*", "group_id": 2, "position": 0, "required": true}, "Analysis date": {"type": "date", "value": "", "group_id": 3, "required": true, "description": "Insert the date of the sample analysis"}, "Physical form": {"type": "select", "value": "bulk", "options": ["bulk", "foil", "thin_film", "powder"], "group_id": 2, "required": true}, "Office address": {"type": "text", "value": "", "group_id": 1, "position": 2}, "Operator email": {"type": "email", "value": "tmp@tmp", "group_id": 1, "position": 3, "required": true}, "Sample history": {"type": "text", "value": "*", "group_id": 2, "position": 3, "required": true, "description": "A reference to a (globally) unique persistent identifier, if is not available, use this field as a free-text description to specify a sub-set of the entire sample history"}, "ORCID identifier": {"type": "text", "value": "", "group_id": 1, "position": 4}, "Preparation date": {"type": "datetime-local", "value": "", "group_id": 2, "position": 4}, "Laboratory operator": {"type": "users", "group_id": 1, "position": 0, "required": true}, "Office telephone number": {"type": "text", "value": "", "group_id": 1, "position": 5}, "Electron Microscope Used": {"type": "select", "value": "FIB-SEM Helios 5 UC", "options": ["FIB-SEM Helios 5 UC", "TEM/STEM Jeol JEM 2010F"], "group_id": 3, "required": true}}}
body_html: Template to be completed before a session at the FIB-SEM or TEM microscope. The information required concerns the operator and the sample analysed

Method.description: A qualifier whether the sample is a real one or a virtual one (in a computer simulation)

Atom types.description: List of comma-separated elements from the periodic table that are contained in the sample.

Analysis date.description: Insert the date of the sample analysis

Sample history.description: A reference to a (globally) unique persistent identifier, if is not available, use this field as a free-text description to specify a sub-set of the entire sample history
